ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation for the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the state */,
  "poverty_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for the poverty rate */,
  "age" REAL /* Average age of the population in the state */,
  "age_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for the age */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Average income of the population in the state */,
  "income_moe" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the income */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population in the state */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the population in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "health_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the health statistic belongs to */,
  "no_health_insurance" REAL /* Percentage of population without health insurance */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate for the state */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Smoking rate for the state */,
  "heart_disease_rate" REAL /* Heart disease rate for the state */,
  "diabetes_rate" REAL /* Diabetes rate for the state */,
  "cancer_rate" REAL /* Cancer rate for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_demographics" (
  "dataset_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset demographic entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the demographic data belongs to */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_demographics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_health_stats" (
  "dataset_health_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset health statistic entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the health statistic belongs to */,
  "health_stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_health_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_health_stats_health_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("health_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_health_stats_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)
